    SELECT [l].[Id], [l].[AutorId], [l].[Color], [l].[Descripcion], [l].[FechaPublicacion], [l].[FechaUltimaEdicion], [l].[Slug], [l].[Titulo]
    FROM [Libros] AS [l]
    ORDER BY (SELECT 1)
    OFFSET @__p_0 ROWS FETCH NEXT @__p_1 ROWS ONLY
) AS [t]
INNER JOIN [Usuarios] AS [u] ON [t].[AutorId] = [u].[Id]

FROM (
    SELECT [l].[LibroId], (
        SELECT TOP(1) [l1].[Titulo]
        FROM [Likes] AS [l0]
        INNER JOIN [Libros] AS [l1] ON [l0].[LibroId] = [l1].[Id]
        WHERE [l].[LibroId] = [l0].[LibroId]) AS [c], COUNT(*) AS [c0]
    FROM [Likes] AS [l]
    GROUP BY [l].[LibroId]
) AS [t]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [u].[Nombre], [l2].[UsuarioId], [l2].[LibroId], [u].[Id]
    FROM [Likes] AS [l2]

    SELECT TOP(@__p_0) [l].[Id], [l].[AutorId], [l].[Color], [l].[Descripcion], [l].[FechaPublicacion], [l].[FechaUltimaEdicion], [l].[Slug], [l].[Titulo], (
        SELECT COUNT(*)
        FROM [Likes] AS [l0]
        WHERE [l].[Id] = [l0].[LibroId]) AS [c]
    FROM [Libros] AS [l]
    ORDER BY (
        SELECT COUNT(*)
        FROM [Likes] AS [l0]
        WHERE [l].[Id] = [l0].[LibroId]) DESC
) AS [t]
INNER JOIN [Usuarios] AS [u] ON [t].[AutorId] = [u].[Id]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [e].[Nombre], [l1].[LibroId], [l1].[EtiquetaId], [e].[Id]
    FROM [LibrosEtiquetas] AS [l1]
    INNER JOIN [Etiquetas] AS [e] ON [l1].[EtiquetaId] = [e].[Id]
) AS [t0] ON [t].[Id] = [t0].[LibroId]
ORDER BY [t].[c] DESC, [t].[Id], [u].[Id], [t0].[LibroId], [t0].[EtiquetaId]

SELECT [t].[Id], [t].[Titulo], [t].[Slug], [t].[Descripcion], [t].[FechaPublicacion], [t].[FechaUltimaEdicion], [u].[Nombre], [t].[Color], [u].[Id], [t0].[Nombre], [t0].[LibroId], [t0].[EtiquetaId], [t0].[Id]
FROM (
    SELECT TOP(@__p_0) [l].[Id], [l].[AutorId], [l].[Color], [l].[Descripcion], [l].[FechaPublicacion], [l].[FechaUltimaEdicion], [l].[Slug], [l].[Titulo], (
        SELECT COUNT(*)
        FROM [Likes] AS [l0]
        WHERE [l].[Id] = [l0].[LibroId]) AS [c]
    FROM [Libros] AS [l]
    ORDER BY (
        SELECT COUNT(*)
        FROM [Likes] AS [l0]
        WHERE [l].[Id] = [l0].[LibroId]) DESC
) AS [t]
INNER JOIN [Usuarios] AS [u] ON [t].[AutorId] = [u].[Id]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [e].[Nombre], [l1].[LibroId], [l1].[EtiquetaId], [e].[Id]
    FROM [LibrosEtiquetas] AS [l1]
    INNER JOIN [Etiquetas] AS [e] ON [l1].[EtiquetaId] = [e].[Id]
